Skills & Expertise

A focused view of the computational methods, machine-learning tools, and programming skills I use to turn molecular simulation problems into reproducible workflows.

Classical MD Ab Initio MD Umbrella Sampling Force-Field Development Metadynamics DFT CCSD(T) Constant Potential Simulation Many-body Potential

Machine Learning
